name: Cheddar Cheese Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound extra sharp Cheddar cheese (coarsely grated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray mini-muffin tins with non-stick cooking oil.
3. In a bowl, combine the flour and butter until crumbly.
4. Stir in the Cheddar cheese and add enough milk to make a sticky dough.
5. Refrigerate the dough, covered, for up to 30 minutes to allow it to come to room temperature.
6. Spoon the dough into the prepared tins.
7. Bake in the middle of the oven for 10-15 minutes, until pale golden brown.
8. Remove the muffins from the tins and cool on a rack.
Yield: 6 dozen mini muffins
